title: ROLLINGDOG 9.5" x 4" (240 mm x 100 mm) Grout Float with Polished Aluminum Back,Black Dense EVA Foam Pad on Rubber Base,Great for Smoothing Floor Tile Grout Work
features: Polished aluminum top, black dense EVA sponge with a rubber base, synthetic grip with rubber grip
Two round corners and two angled corners allow for rounded spreading of grout or directly into corners
Durable float allows for smooth, even grout application
Beveled edges make for easier application
Rubber base Float is used to spread grout into the joints when grouting ceramic tile
description: Product Description Floats ROLLINGDOG’s plastering floats are made of plastic or a soft rubber sponge that will usually be used after lightly spraying the plaster on a wall with a water mist, to smooth and shape the plaster. ROLLINGDOG has several different grout floats made with EVA foam,durable rubber or a combination of both.An ergonomic handle that offers good control and comfortable use is attached to the base with an aluminum plate. Floats are used for smoothing surfaces of plaster,grout and concrete. ROLLINGDOG offers a variety of floats for use while working with plaster or grout. 9.5" x 4" Float＆Plastering Trowel 12.99 Piece 12.99 240mm x 100mm Size 240mm x 100mm EVA foam rubber base Material solid rubber base 12.99 Piece 10.99 240mm x 100mm Size 240mm x 100mm EVA foam rubber base Material EVA foam Previous page 9.5" x 4" Learn More 9.5" x 4" Learn More Next page
